nasb.text: “Or if the body sustains in its skin a burn by fire, and the raw flesh of the burn becomes a bright spot, reddish-white, or white,

esv.text: “Or, when the body has a burn on its skin and the raw flesh of the burn becomes a spot, reddish-white or white,

cnv.text: “如果人的皮肉發炎，發炎紅腫的肉成了火斑，白中帶紅，或是純白，

ccb.text: “如果有人被火烧伤，患处变白或白中带红，
